query:
-- Inventário ativo e seus endereços
SELECT inv.id AS invId, inv.status, il.id AS invLocId, il.locationId, il.status AS locStatus,
       wl.code AS locationCode, wl.zoneCode
FROM inventories inv
JOIN inventoryLocations il ON il.inventoryId = inv.id
JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON wl.id = il.locationId
WHERE inv.status IN ('pending','in_progress')
ORDER BY wl.code
LIMIT 10;

-- Saldo no endereço M03-01-01 (locationId 390001)
SELECT i.id, i.locationId, i.labelCode, i.uniqueCode, i.status, i.quantity,
       wl.code AS locationCode
FROM inventory i
JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON wl.id = i.locationId
WHERE i.labelCode = '44306022D14LA124' AND i.status = 'available';
